query:
SELECT ae.name, mm.year, mm.month, mm.dialsTotal, mm.demosTotal, mm.arrUsd, mm.demosFromPipedrive
FROM monthly_metrics mm
JOIN ae_profiles ae ON mm.aeId = ae.id
WHERE ae.name LIKE '%Joe%' OR ae.name LIKE '%Payne%'
ORDER BY mm.year, mm.month;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4ELZY9nPkashd2p.root --database gAuoMoig6vkmXbQaeq6Bo3 --execute 
SELECT ae.name, mm.year, mm.month, mm.dialsTotal, mm.demosTotal, mm.arrUsd, mm.demosFromPipedrive
FROM monthly_metrics mm
JOIN ae_profiles ae ON mm.aeId = ae.id
WHERE ae.name LIKE '%Joe%' OR ae.name LIKE '%Payne%'
ORDER BY mm.year, mm.month;
